target: 2. A Long-Overdue Meal
Ah~, it smells so good! Shin-chan's curry, it's been a while.
Sorry Mio, can you carry this salad over too?
Sure thing. Wow, the salad looks delicious too.
Tonight's dinner is super fancy. Right, big sister?
Yeah…
It's to celebrate our reunion after two years, and also as thanks for letting me stay here tonight.
Of course, you can expect the taste to be great too.
U-Ugh...
So it was true that Shin-chan's dad and mom aren't home today.
Why would I lie about that? Those two went to Osaka for a university symposium.
I thought it was an excuse to spend as much time as possible with my sister.
What?!
Idiot, it's nothing like that.
Mio, don't say weird things.
Besides, even if there were circumstances, Dad didn't have to let Shinpei stay at our place.
Really, doing unnecessary things.
Are you saying things you don't mean again?
No! It's my true feelings from the bottom of my heart!
And Shinpei is Shinpei too! Don't you ever think about holding back a little?!
Well... but since Alain went out of his way to invite me.
Big sister, are you still sulking? You've been like that since the afternoon.
I'm not sulking or anything――
Ahahahaha, well let's eat soon. At this rate, big sister is going to collapse.
I-I'm not hungry enough to collapse!
You're just pushing yourself...
Shinpei, did you say something?
No, not really?
Honestly, big sister, when are you ever going to be honest?
Mi-o? If you say anything more, I won't let you have any curry!
Why are you acting so bossy, big sister? Shin-chan is the one who made it.
Here Ushio, I made yours a large portion. Just sit down quietly.
I don't need a large portion. And I'm not even going to eat it anyway!
(Good grief...)
Mio, yours is a normal portion.
Y-Yeah. Thanks, Shin-chan.

Alain hasn't come back yet, right?
I don't know where he went.
He'll probably be a while, won't he? He seems busy getting dragged into preparations today.
Preparations for what?
Isn't it obvious? The summer festival at Hitogashima Shrine.
What are you doing? You dropped your spoon, you know?
A-Ah, sorry. My hand just slipped a little.
(What was that… feeling?)

(As soon as I heard 'summer festival',
it was like my whole body got goosebumps…)
Big sister, can you get me another spoon?
Big sister?
Summer… festival…
(Even Ushio… had the same reaction?)
What's wrong with both of you? You've got major goosebumps...
I don't really know, but I suddenly felt a chill...
(It really is the same as me...)
M-Maybe the AC temperature setting is just a bit low.
I don't think it's any different from usual.
Ah, maybe you're catching a cold. Do you have a fever?
I don't think so…
Shinpei, let me see your forehead. I'll check with my hand.
A-Ah.
Yeah, your forehead isn't hot. It's about the same as mine.
That might mean you're catching a cold too, big sister. You felt a chill, right?
In that case, I'll compare it with Mio's forehead.
Yeah, it's about the same.
You seem fine, right? Well, even if you had a fever, eating Shin-chan's curry would fix you right up.
Right, big sister?
Yeah… I guess so.
T-The food didn't do anything wrong, so I guess I'll eat it.
You make it sound like I did do something wrong...
Come on, let's eat before it gets cold. Itadakimasu!
Itadakimasu.
So gooood~!!
Shinpei, it seems your curry-making skills haven't dropped.
Yeah, yeah, thanks.
I-I'm not praising you!
If anything, since you go to a culinary school, isn't it a problem that there's no obvious improvement?
Of course the taste is the same. I didn't change the recipe or the ingredients.
You didn't add any fancy secret ingredients or anything like that?
What are you talking about? Isn't this the taste you wanted to eat, big sister?
N-No it's not!?
Haha…
(That creepy chill from earlier...)
(What on earth... was that?)
